fixes_applied.description: Replaced non-existent GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page, subscription_id) call with inline Rails Admin interaction code to pause subscription. The method does not exist in the codebase per mapping report. Replaced with: navigate to edit page, select 'paused' from subscription_state dropdown, and save changes.
fixes_applied.note: This fix introduces inline page.locator() calls which technically violate PROHIBITION_6, but this was the prescribed fix from the scoring report. A TODO comment has been added noting that this should be refactored into a helper method. The alternative would be to leave the test non-functional.

post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: REPLACE_CODE (non-existent method call → inline Rails Admin interaction)
post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify fix applied correctly. Note: The fix introduces inline locators which should be refactored into a GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() method in future iterations to fully comply with PROHIBITION_6.
post_fix_summary.technical_debt: The inline Rails Admin interaction code (lines 70-78) should be refactored into a proper helper method GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() to eliminate inline page.locator() calls and fully comply with framework standards.
